name: github_list_installations_for_authenticated_app
description: GET /app/installations — list installations for the authenticated GitHub App. Requires JWT. Optional since (ISO 8601) and outdated. Pagination: page, per_page 1-100 default 100; all_pages and max_pages.

since.description: Only show results last updated after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

outdated.description: Filter for outdated installations (GitHub REST query param).
